input.initialPrompt: Analyze code coverage and risk hotspots for this project. I haven't run any coverage yet.

data.reasoningText:
The user wants me to analyze code coverage and risk hotspots for this .NET project. They haven't run coverage yet, so I need to:

1. First understand the project structure
2. Set up and run code coverage
3. Analyze the results

Let me start by exploring the project structure.

data.reasoningText:
Now I have a good understanding of the project. Let me run code coverage using coverlet (which is already included as a dependency) and analyze the results.

I'll run the tests with coverage collection using Cobertura format so I can parse it.

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-1400cd2d512e44e28d4ef3b260c3e949 && dotnet test --collect:\"XPlat Code Coverage\" --results-directory ./TestResults -- DataCollectionRunSettings.DataCollectors.DataCollector.Configuration.Format=cobertura 2>&1", "description": "Run tests with code coverage", "initial_wait": 60}
